rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (the assertion that the insight clarifies the relationship between the two design directions).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (no changes were made to technical claims or citations).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
